short_notes: Hey guys! So it turns out that xAI has unfortunately (and finally) removed grok-2-vision as an API model, taking away the last of the vision-capable legacy models as xAI moves to newer models like Grok 4.20. So now this shortcut has to do the same and remove grok-2-vision from the list of usable models to prevent errors. RIP grok-2-vision.
